title: Soulection Radio Show #463 (ROMderful Radio)
content:
Birmingham’s [ROMderful](https://soundcloud.com/romderful) takes over to share unreleased music.

<!--more-->

Follow ROMderful on [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/romderful), [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/jGJvjGU), [SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/romderful), [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/romderful), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/romderful/), [Bandcamp](https://romderful.bandcamp.com/), [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/artist/3Aum3IcJEKuGsWVPBZnvyU), [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCimD9o7E6tyMpsfuKRIkMiQ)

See ROMderful live near you on [SongKick](https://www.songkick.com/artists/9111289-romderful)
